Text: You wake up in a dark, cold room. The only light comes from a small crack in the door ahead.

Options.Text: Search the room in the dark

Text: The door creaks open, revealing a long hallway lined with portraits. At the end is a glowing red exit.
You fumble around and find a small key! But suddenly, you hear a growl...
The portraits are all of people who look eerily similar to you. The eyes seem to follow you. You decide it's time to leave.
You push open the exit door and burst into the sunlight. You have escaped! You survived.
A monster jumps out from the shadows. You put up a good fight, but it's too much. The adventure ends here.
